    MILITARY GOVERNMENT O F SANTO DOMINGO.

                    Execuvive Order No. 630.

Appointing Mr. John Loomis vice Lieutenat Commander Smith,.

                          0. G. No. 3226.
    By virtue of the powers vested in the Military Government
of Santo D,omingo, the following Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated :

      John Loomis, Trezsurer of the Dominican Republic is hereby
appointed Assistant to t h e Officer-in-Charge of the Department
of Staie of Finance aiid Commerce ar?3 Assistant of the Officer-
in-Charge of Food Control, with authority t o administer the
a f f a i r s of both Departments in the absence of t h e Officer-in-
Charge. This appointment is made in the place of Lieutenant
Commander Lybrand P. Smith, United States Navy who, having
+en ordered to duty in the United States, is hereby relieveid of
the administration of these offices.
                              THOMAS SNOWDEN,
                        Rear-Admiral, United States Navy,
                       Military Governor of Santo Domingo.

Santo Domingo, D. R.,
J u n . 1, 1921.

     MILITARY GOVERNMENT OF SANTO DOMINGO.
